feature_1_desc: All sellers are verified Swiss residents with authentic documentation and complete vehicle history records.

feature_3_desc: We facilitate secure shipping to Eastern Europe, North Africa, and 45+ international destinations worldwide.
featured_subtitle: Quality Swiss vehicles at affordable export prices
footer_description: Connecting Swiss car sellers with international buyers worldwide. Quality used vehicles at affordable export prices.
